terminalCommands.default:
help|Available: help · projects · hardware · firmware · experience · contact · clear — or ask me anything in plain English.
projects|Deployed systems: 01 · MERN Movie Management Dashboard (React, Node, MongoDB, AWS). 02 · Agentic AI Digital Twin (RAG, OpenRouter, MERN). Type "tell me about project 1" for details.
hardware|Hardware focus: STM32 (ARM Cortex-M), ESP32, GPIO/UART/SPI/I2C protocols, bare-metal C/C++ and RTOS concepts.
firmware|Firmware expertise: C/C++, register-level programming, interrupt handling, peripheral drivers, moving from full-stack into embedded systems.
experience|B.Tech ECE, SASTRA Deemed University (2021-2025). National Hackathon Finalist — Gidy AgentX (autonomous AI agents). Full-stack background, now going deep into embedded.
contact|Email: rithiksharon.a@gmail.com · GitHub: github.com/Rithik-Sharon-A · LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/rithik-sharon · Chennai, India

terminalErrorFallback.default: ERR: connection failed. Email rithiksharon.a@gmail.com directly.
